name: Golf Kings
about: Golf Kings is an indoor golf simulator lounge and pro shop with multiple locations in New Jersey, including Brick, Wall, and Toms River. The facility offers a modern golf experience powered by TrackMan technology, featuring a virtual driving range, a library of courses from around the world, and private bays equipped with TVs. Memberships are available and include benefits like reduced hourly rates and discounted lessons. The venue also operates a pro shop for club fittings, regripping services, and apparel sales.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan technology for detailed swing analytics
Private bays with TVs for watching sports while playing
Variety of courses available for play from around the world
On-site PGA professionals for lessons and club fittings

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club rentals and pro shop services, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for consistency.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or alcohol service is mentioned, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies depending on player skill level and simulator usage, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly amenities or policies.
